scripts.test:integration: node --input-type=module -e "if (!process.env.DATABASE_URL) throw new Error('PostgreSQL integration tests require DATABASE_URL.');" && prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma && vitest run --no-file-parallelism src/postgres.integration.test.ts src/administration/postgres-auth.integration.test.ts src/administration/postgres-configuration.integration.test.ts src/administration/ai-configuration-store.integration.test.ts src/administration/diagnostic-export-store.integration.test.ts src/administration/platform-link-configuration.integration.test.ts src/administration/provider-capability-test-store.integration.test.ts src/administration/publication-profile-configuration-store.integration.test.ts src/administration/source-schedule-configuration.integration.test.ts src/administration/webhook-endpoint-configuration.integration.test.ts src/administration/workspace-role-assignment-store.integration.test.ts src/analysis/postgres-analysis.integration.test.ts src/ai/postgres-ai.integration.test.ts src/ai/postgres-ai-binding-resolver.integration.test.ts src/attachments/postgres-attachments.integration.test.ts src/retrieval/postgres-retrieval.integration.test.ts src/knowledge/postgres-source-command.integration.test.ts src/publication/postgres-publication.integration.test.ts src/operations/postgres-operations.integration.test.ts
